movies.title: Blow Out
movies.synopsis: A movie sound recordist accidentally records evidence that proves a car accident was actually murder, then finds himself pulled into the danger around it.

movies.title: Escape from New York
movies.synopsis: In a dystopian future, ex-soldier and criminal Snake Plissken is sent into Manhattan, now a maximum-security prison, to rescue the U.S. President.

movies.title: Ghost in the Shell
movies.synopsis: A cyborg policewoman and her partner hunt a mysterious hacker known as the Puppet Master in a networked future where identity and consciousness are unstable.

movies.title: The Big Sleep
movies.synopsis: Private detective Philip Marlowe is hired to investigate blackmail and becomes trapped in a dense web of gambling debts, murder, and organized crime.

movies.title: The Outfit
movies.synopsis: After robbing a mob-owned bank and serving time, Earl Macklin is released from prison and starts a private war against the crime organization behind it.

movies.title: Blade Runner
movies.synopsis: A blade runner is sent to find and terminate four escaped replicants who have returned to Earth in search of their creator.

movies.title: Point Blank
movies.synopsis: After being double-crossed and left for dead, Walker returns with a single-minded objective: recover the money stolen from him.
